sentences.english: I'm Lisa and I'll be your onboarding buddy for the first two weeks.
sentences.korean: 저는 리사이고 첫 2주간 온보딩 도우미가 될 거예요.

sentences.english: Thank you. I'm excited to get started.
Today we'll set up your laptop and email and go over the company handbook.
sentences.korean: 오늘은 노트북과 이메일을 설정하고 회사 안내서를 살펴볼 거예요.

sentences.english: Do I need to install any specific software?
IT already pre-installed everything you need.
sentences.korean: IT팀이 필요한 것을 이미 다 설치해뒀어요.

sentences.english: You'll also have a one-on-one with your manager at three PM today.
Should I prepare anything for that meeting?
Not really. It's mostly an introduction and a chance for you to ask any questions about the role.
sentences.korean: 별로요. 주로 소개와 직무에 대해 궁금한 것을 질문할 기회예요.

sentences.english: That sounds great. I do have a few questions about the project timeline.
sentences.korean: 좋네요. 프로젝트 일정에 대해 질문이 몇 가지 있어요.

quiz.question: What does '신입 교육/온보딩' mean in English?
